title: Move Install
notes: Games can now be moved to a different library folder, just like in Steam.
Game saves and progress are fully preserved during the move — save files inside the install folder are copied along with the game.
DropDash highscores are unaffected since they are stored independently of the install path.
A new Move Install dialog lets you pick any available library as the target, with a clear note confirming your data is safe.
The Move Install button appears on the game detail page for all installed games and is disabled when another job is already running.
